javadoc_before:
/** * Filters particular tests during/after test discovery. * *

Clients should not implement this interface directly but rather one of * its subinterfaces. * * @since 5.0 * @see DiscoveryFilter */
javadoc_after:
/** * A {@link Filter} can be applied to determine if an object should be * included or excluded in a result set. * *

For example, tests may be filtered during or after test discovery * based on certain criteria. * *

Clients should not implement this interface directly but rather one of * its subinterfaces. * * @since 5.0 * @see DiscoveryFilter */
